sourcesContent:
// Initial seed data for the Cities application
const initialCities = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: "Tokyo",
    country: "Japan",
    population: "13,960,000",
    continent: "Asia",
    language: "Japanese",
    timezone: "UTC+9",
    flag: "🇯🇵",
    description:
      "The bustling capital of Japan, known for its blend of ultra-modern and traditional culture.",
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: "Paris",
    country: "France",
    population: "2,161,000",
    continent: "Europe",
    language: "French",
    timezone: "UTC+1",
    flag: "🇫🇷",
    description:
      "The City of Light, famous for art, fashion, gastronomy, and the iconic Eiffel Tower.",
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: "New York",
    country: "United States",
    population: "8,336,000",
    continent: "North America",
    language: "English",
    timezone: "UTC-5",
    flag: "🇺🇸",
    description:
      "The city that never sleeps—global hub for finance, culture, fashion, and entertainment.",
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    name: "Cairo",
    country: "Egypt",
    population: "10,100,000",
    continent: "Africa",
    language: "Arabic",
    timezone: "UTC+2",
    flag: "🇪🇬",
    description:
      "The Arab world's cultural capital, home to ancient pyramids and the mighty Nile River.",
  },
];

export default initialCities;
